name: Landscape Rock Calculator
seo_title: Landscape Rock Calculator ? Tonnes & Cubic Yards
seo_description: Planning a rock garden or driveway base? Enter area, depth and rock type to get weight in tonnes and cubic yards for decorative rock, gravel or crushed stone.
description: Free online landscape rock calculator. Enter area length and area width to get instant results.
mistakes: Spreading rock too thin — under 3 cm allows weeds to push through
Skipping landscape fabric — rocks sink into soil without a barrier
Using the wrong rock size — 10–20 mm is standard for decorative gravel
result_context: You need {volume} m³ of decorative rock, weighing approximately {weight} tonnes, to cover {area} m².
formula_display: Area = L × W; Volume = area × depth; Weight = volume × density
example_label: 4 m × 3 m landscaping bed, 5 cm deep, standard gravel density
desc: Free online landscape rock calculator. Enter area length and area width to get instant results.
